title: zinnia elegans
intro: Zinnia elegans, also known as Mexican zinnia or common zinnia, is a perennial flower plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and skin infections. The health benefits of Zinnia elegans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its flowers and leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
